positive: Stylized central composition featuring a fantastical golden retriever puppy playfully exploring a dense, bioluminescent forest path. The forest elements include glowing mushrooms, trailing vines with delicate geometric patterns, and large fern leaves casting dappled light. The golden retriever puppy should be the focus, rendered in a clean silhouette style with rich, warm fur tones contrasted by the cool, vibrant neon blue and cyan glow of the forest. Use thick line art, high contrast black and white outlines layered over vibrant, saturated color blocks. Studio Ghibli meet Art Deco poster art style. Optimal for repeating textile print, graphic novel style, flat vectors, detailed, centered, volumetric lighting, dramatic shadows, trending on ArtStation.
negative: photorealism, blurry, noisy, low contrast, grayscale, bad anatomy, deformed, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, cropped, fuzzy, poorly rendered paws, busy background, cluttered, bokeh
